'''Arroyo''' was a group of three [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttles]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] to [[Battle of Brigia (Galactic Civil War)|evacuate]] [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] personnel from the [[Brigia Rebel base|base]] on [[Brigia/Legends|Brigia]] during [[Operation Strike Fear]]. They were protected during the battle by [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] assisted by [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron]]. Thanks to the strong Rebel defense, all three shuttles escaped, ensuring the survival of a significant portion of the Alliance chain of command.

{{Ship-stub}}
